arts.ttl: Manchester United sporting director Dan Ashworth working long hours as Erik ten Hag decision looms
arts.sum: Man Utd drew 3-3 with Porto in the Europa League and Erik ten Hag's position is under immense scrutiny.

arts.ttl: I spotted Ruud van Nistelrooy's strange Man United request as Erik ten Hag was on the brink
arts.sum: Ten-man Manchester United rescued a draw against FC Porto in the Europa League, but it did little to ease the pressure on Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives two-word response to question about Erik ten Hag at Manchester United
arts.sum: Harry Maguire scored from the bench in Man Utd's 3-3 draw with Porto in the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag ordered to drop Man Utd star for crunch Aston Villa clash - 'He'll have to'
arts.sum: Manchester United led 2-0 at Porto before a defensive collapse allowed the hosts back into the game

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer nears Cristiano Ronaldo Man Utd mark after record four-goal outing
arts.sum: Cole Palmer set a Premier League record when he scored four goals against Brighton and could set another with the sale of the shirt he was wearing challenging Cristiano Ronaldo's mark

arts.ttl: Maguire throws Ten Hag a late lifeline by rescuing Manchester United in Porto
arts.sum: Porto took advantage of Man United's ongoing defensive frailty, but Harry Maguire's stoppage-time equaliser likely saved Erik ten Hag's job -- for now.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag bemoans defensive lapses as Man United waste flying start in Porto
arts.sum: The visitors threw away a 2-0 lead before snatching a late point.

arts.ttl: What Erik ten Hag and Ruud van Nistelrooy did to Man United squad after Porto draw
arts.sum: Harry Maguire's last-gasp equaliser saw Manchester United come away with a 3-3 draw against FC Porto in the Europa League after being 2-0 up.

arts.ttl: Porto vs. Man United: Erik ten Hag reveals why he replaced Marcus Rashford at half time
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag reveals he replaced Marcus Rashford at half time because they need to rotate ahead of their trip to Aston Villa on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives five-word verdict in response to Erik ten Hag sack fears
arts.sum: Harry Maguire is involved in yet another scenario where a Manchester United manager is facing the sack with Erik ten Hag coming under increasing pressure at Old Trafford
